title: Return and exchange policy
text: Returns are accepted within 14 days for unworn items with tags attached. Exchange for a different size is free. Refunds are processed to original payment method within 5 business days. Sale items are final sale.

title: Sizing and fit assistance
text: Our virtual stylists can help with sizing and fit recommendations over voice or chat. We carry Nigerian sizes (S-3XL) and international sizes. Custom tailoring is available for select items at an additional fee (2-5 business days).

title: Delivery and shipping
text: Same-day delivery in Lagos for orders placed before 3 PM (NGN 2,000). Next-day delivery to Abuja and Port Harcourt (NGN 3,000). Nationwide delivery within 3-5 business days (NGN 3,500). Free shipping on orders above NGN 50,000.

title: Personal styling service
text: Book a free 30-minute virtual styling session with our fashion consultants. They can suggest outfits for events, help build a capsule wardrobe, or assist with color/pattern coordination. Available Mon-Sat 10 AM - 6 PM.
